scope: All legendary items with flat lethality + lethality-scaling passives (wiki Notes vs sim, patch-verified)

rows.wikiPassive: Flux: 10% + 0.25% per 1 lethality ult CD refund on takedown (V26.09); min 0.5s CD
Shaped Charge: 30/15 + 1.5/0.75 true per ability, 45s ICD; Sabotage structure burn
notes: Sabotage (turret burn after takedown) not in 1v1 DPS sim
Proc blocked by spell shield — not modeled

rows.wikiPassive: Eminence: 12 AD + 3 per statue rank for 60s on takedown (wiki item template)
Cleave 40%/20% AD AoE on-hit; Heretical Cleave active 80–120% AD
notes: Wiki notes fetch uses Hydra→Titanic page — use Profane_Hydra slug

rows.wikiPassive: Shield Reaver: 50%/35% shred, 3s venom, pre-damage ordering
notes: Meta duel defaults 0 shields — passive invisible in optimizer

rows.wikiPassive: Death: execute below 5% max HP; Taxes gold not DPS
notes: Raw damage, not blocked by spell shield per wiki

rows.wikiPassive: Nightstalker: 50 + 1.5/leth true on next AA after OOV; Blackout vision
Firmament: +15/12 leth 4s, 9%/7% current HP; Galvanize energize
notes: Innate 10 leth + temp leth before proc damage per wiki Notes

rows.wikiPassive: Haunt OOC MS + Spectral Shards; Wraith Step active
notes: Movement passives wikiGap for DPS sim

rows.wikiStats: 55 AD, 18 lethality + Preparation scaling lethality OOC

components.The Brutalizer: 5 lethality (V14.6), 25 AD, 10 AH — not in pool

lethalityFormula: Flat lethality = armor pen (full value since V14.1) — sim correct
